import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { LayoutDashboard, Users, Send, Settings, Bell, Star, MoreVertical, Plus, Zap, Shield, Rocket } from 'lucide-react'; import Navbar from '../components/Navbar'; const Dashboard = () => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('Overview'); const stats = [ { label: 'Active Requests', value: '12', icon: Zap, color: 'text-yellow-400' }, { label: 'Buddies Linked', value: '48', icon: Users, color: 'text-blue-400' }, { label: 'Reputation', value: '4.9', icon: Star, color: 'text-purple-400' }, { label: 'Safety Index', value: '98%', icon: Shield, color: 'text-green-400' }, ]; return (

Your Dashboard

Welcome back, Alex Johnson!

{/* Stats Grid */}
{stats.map((stat, idx) => (
+12%

{stat.value}

{stat.label}

 ))}
{/* Action Center */}
{/* Main Feed */}

Current Activity

{/* Sidebar Section */}

Quick Buddy Link

SOS TRIGGERED

Immediate campus assistance required at Science Building.

); }; const ActivityItem = ({ title, time, status, buddies }) => (

{title}

{time}

{status}

{buddies}

); const FriendItem = ({ name, img, online }) => (
{img}
{name}
); export default Dashboard;
